name: Heliox Security Construct
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Door-Warden
entries: The Heliox Security Construct has advantage on attack rolls against creatures attempting to move through a doorway, hatch, or passage 5 feet wide or narrower.

trait.name: Brace for Impact
entries: The Heliox Security Construct has advantage on saving throws against being pushed or knocked prone while aboard a moving vehicle.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Heliox Security Construct makes one Glaive attack and one Shield Bash attack.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) slashing damage.

action.name: Shield Bash
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet and knocked prone.

action.name: Hold the Line (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Until the start of the Heliox Security Construct's next turn, it and allied constructs within 10 feet gain a +2 bonus to AC, and opportunity attacks made by those allies have advantage.

reaction.name: Intercept
entries: When a creature within 5 feet of the Heliox Security Construct would move past it, the construct makes one Shield Bash attack against that creature.
